failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but 201.2 bar required
Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: PFA may degrade under prolonged exposure to 201.2 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Conduct material stress tests at 201.2 bar

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at 201.2 bar for 24 hours to test BPR and material integrity
Monitor solvent vapour pressure at 120°C to ensure pump inlet pressure is adequate
Conduct stress tests on PFA material at 201.2 bar to assess degradation
